retirements.removalEvidence: The default renders five summary fields and three closed details elements; live computed styles report every disclosure body as display none with zero height.
The explanatory lede, duplicate source contract and formation identity reading rows, and generic broader-dimensions block no longer render; result-specific proof remains in the three disclosures.

evidence.result: 385/385 passed, including five default fields, three closed disclosures, and common-style preservation

Applicative xeloa to xelo-ia authorized Nimitzxeloih.; the default showed only route, Type 1 applicative with Andrews 26.2, valence/object-depth change, Andrews rule authorization, witness status, and three disclosure titles.
All three bodies computed to display none and zero height while closed. Formation and source analysis opened as a grid with three typed sections and closed again.
The authorized explainer measured 873 by 370 pixels with five summary fields and zero horizontal overflow.
Phone-width Result measured a 380-pixel root and 360 by 467 explainer, one-column facts, all three bodies closed, and zero page, root, or explainer overflow.
ALIGNED with no renderer construction, optional dependency, contract, browser-script, or tracked-report regression
